---
title: "About"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

Hello! I’m Manasvi, currently a Master’s student in Business Analytics at UC Irvine. I have a background in Computer Science and Economics, and I’m interested in how data and AI can be used to solve real-world business problems.

## My Background

I hold a B.A. in Computer Science and Economics from Whittier College, where I also served as captain of the women’s tennis team and developed strong leadership and teamwork skills. My academic and professional experience focuses on data analytics and business intelligence, applying data-driven insights to solve real-world business problems.

## What I Do

I focus on using data to support better decision-making and uncover insights that drive impact. My strengths include:

- Working with data to identify patterns, build models, and generate insights that support business decisions.

- Presenting complex information in a clear and actionable way using tools like Power BI, Tableau, and interactive dashboards.

- Approaching problems with a structured mindset and translating data into practical business recommendations.

## My Interests

I’m particularly interested in the intersection of technology, healthcare, and business. I enjoy working on problems that have real-world impact and require both technical and strategic thinking.

Outside of work, I enjoy staying active, playing tennis, and exploring new ideas and creative projects.

## View My Projects

I enjoy building data-driven projects that apply analytics, machine learning, and visualization to real-world problems.

You can explore my latest work here:

🔗 [GitHub Projects](https://github.com/mvardham-jpg)


## Let’s Connect

I'm always open to opportunities, collaborations, and conversations about data, analytics, and business insights.

Feel free to connect with me:

🔗 [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/manasvi-vardham)

Thanks for stopping by!
